description: Breaking down menu items with specific prices and itemized ordering details to create transparency and facilitate purchasing decisions directly from Instagram.
structural_recipe: Post restaurant photos with itemized menu breakdown listing specific dish names and prices. Structure captions to include: restaurant name + location, photo credit, brief quality assessment, then clearly formatted list of ordered items with pricing. Use bullet points or line breaks for readability. Include emoji for visual engagement (🤩). Format should allow easy copy-paste for customer orders.
why_it_works: Saudi consumers value transparency in pricing and explicit product details before making purchase decisions. Itemized pricing reduces friction in the ordering journey and builds trust through clarity. Direct pricing display positions Instagram as a viable sales channel, appealing to budget-conscious diners who want to verify value before committing.
transplantation_caveats: Must ensure all prices are current and accurate to maintain credibility
Pricing transparency may invite price comparison shopping across competitors
Format should comply with restaurant's official pricing to avoid confusion or disputes
May require frequent updates if menu prices change seasonally or operationally
